overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction game showing a character in armored spacesuit walking through a United Colonies military facility. The environment features industrial metal architecture, green faction banners, and armor displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: UC Vanguard military facility corridor with equipment storage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the facility corridor past equipment crates and storage shelves

notable_agents.action: standing guard near equipment crates wearing black uniform with red shoulder accents

entered.detail: green fabric banner with white UC logo and star symbol hanging from ceiling
large vertical support beam with riveted metal plates and industrial finish
stacked military storage containers with yellow and gray coloring
long fluorescent light fixture providing warm yellow illumination

segments.scene_description: Walking through a United Colonies military facility corridor characterized by green faction banners hanging from the ceiling and industrial metal pillars. The character passes equipment crates and a standing guard in uniform while moving forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: equipment display room with armor mannequins and weapon racks

events.description: entering the armor display area with illuminated mannequins on circular platforms

agents.ego_description: proceeding past the armor display area toward the back of the room

notable_agents.action: seated technician in green lab coat working at equipment station

entered.detail: full-body mannequin wearing white and orange spacesuit armor standing on illuminated circular platform
rectangular transparent case containing weapons and equipment on counter
wall-mounted metal rack holding multiple rifles

segments.scene_description: Entering an equipment display room featuring armor-clad mannequins on illuminated platforms and glass display cases. A technician in a green coat works at a station on the left as the character continues forward past weapon racks.

events.description: approaching the illuminated exit doorway at the end of the display room
passing through the doorway into the adjacent corridor

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing through the exit doorway into the next area

entered.detail: metal doorway frame with bright overhead lighting leading to upper level stairwell
tall metal storage cabinet with multiple compartments

segments.scene_description: Approaching a brightly lit exit doorway at the end of the display room. The character passes through the doorway, leaving the mannequins and display cases behind, and enters a narrow corridor leading to a stairwell.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a military facility that transitions from a functional corridor into a curated equipment gallery before ending in a narrow transit passage. It begins by moving past industrial metal pillars and green faction banners, passing equipment crates and a standing guard. As the camera advances, the scene opens into a display room where the lighting shifts to illuminate armor-clad mannequins on platforms and glass cases, while a technician works at a nearby station. The movement continues past weapon racks toward a brightly lit exit doorway at the far end of the room. Finally, the camera passes through the doorway, leaving the exhibits behind to enter a narrow corridor leading toward a stairwell.
